segments.text: I bet you can name this brand without [music] even seeing the logo. It was easy because best brands in the world does not rely on logos. They use visual
anchors like these three stripes. If you think about it, a logo is small. You have to be close in order to see it. But this is [music] not the case with these
stripes. Bought them from across the street. You don't need to read the brand name. [music] The stripes tell you everything. But you know, Burberry took this even further. Just look at the
famous check pattern. [music] It used to be hidden inside the coat lining. No one saw it. But then they flipped it inside out. Now the pattern is the status
symbol. You don't need to read Burberry to know it's expensive. [music]
But it's not as crazy at Cadbury because they stole the color. That specific shade of purple is now burned into our brains. Once you see the color, you
don't need to read dairy milk. You already know that is some genius design. Subscribe for more.
